title: (BUG) tui/event.rs: sessions HashMap grows unbounded via PaymentRequest flood
description: Every incoming PaymentRequest message from any relay peer creates a new entry in state.sessions (tui/src/app.rs AppState.sessions: HashMap<Uuid, PaymentSession>). The insert path in tui/src/event.rs calls state.sessions.entry(session_id).or_insert_with(...) with no eviction policy, no cap, and no rate limit. A malicious peer can send an unlimited stream of PaymentRequest messages with distinct session UUIDs, growing this map until OOM. Fix: add a per-peer session limit (e.g. 100 active sessions) and evict oldest when the cap is reached.
